form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up eased back early on 6th of 10 at Pinjarra Scarpside Mdn on March 12 over 1200m, 7 len behind Shilling Lane carrying 58kg at $61. Second run from a spell ran last of 8 at Belmont Park Cl1 on March 25 over 1000m, 6 len behind Acorn carrying 56kg at $91. Outclassed.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3). Third-up today. First-up eased back early on 6th of 10 at Pinjarra Scarpside Mdn on March 12 over 1200m, 7 len behind Shilling Lane carrying 58kg at $61. Second run from a spell ran last of 8 at Belmont Park Cl1 on March 25 over 1000m, 6 len behind Acorn carrying 56kg at $91. Outclassed.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide for the majority. Lay inwards in the straight.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break; only one run when ran last of 15 at Albany Mdn on January 29 over 1230m, 12 len behind Huhtamaki carrying 58kg at $71. Resumes today and would rather see how he's come back before considering.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1.5). Resuming after a break; only one run when ran last of 15 at Albany Mdn on January 29 over 1230m, 12 len behind Huhtamaki carrying 58kg at $71. Resumes today and would rather see how he's come back before considering.

form.formComment: Third race start. Promising on debut 3rd of 13 at Belmont Park Mdn on September 24 over 1200m, 1.75 len behind Toronado Rocket with 55.5kg at $41. Returned from break 3rd of 14 at this track 3yo Mdn on March 22 over 1200m, 1.2 len behind Mamma Says So with 57kg at $12. Fitter for that run and will be tough to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3). Third race start. Promising on debut 3rd of 13 at Belmont Park Mdn on September 24 over 1200m, 1.75 len behind Toronado Rocket with 55.5kg at $41. Returned from break 3rd of 14 at this track 3yo Mdn on March 22 over 1200m, 1.2 len behind Mamma Says So with 57kg at $12. Fitter for that run and will be tough to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up from on straightening until approaching the 150m.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months 5th of 11 at Albany Mdn on March 26 over 1100m, on a slow track; 4 len behind Next Destination with 57kg at $6. Previously second-up 5th of 11 at Northam 3yo Mdn on October 26 over 1400m, 2 len behind Dominatus carrying 57kg at $21. Can do much better this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). Second-up. First-up after five months 5th of 11 at Albany Mdn on March 26 over 1100m, on a slow track; 4 len behind Next Destination with 57kg at $6. Previously second-up 5th of 11 at Northam 3yo Mdn on October 26 over 1400m, 2 len behind Dominatus carrying 57kg at $21. Can do much better this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted inwards abruptly at the 1200m. Raced wide throughout.

form.formComment: Comes off a 59 day let-up. Most recently 7th of 10 at Mt Barker Mdn on February 8 over 1100m, 6 len behind Reggio Calabria with 55.5kg at $16. The run before that faded in the straight 7th of 14 at Mt Barker Mdn on January 18 over 1300m, 5.5 len behind Tidwell carrying 56.5kg at $13. Safely held.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0.5). Comes off a 59 day let-up. Most recently 7th of 10 at Mt Barker Mdn on February 8 over 1100m, 6 len behind Reggio Calabria with 55.5kg at $16. The run before that faded in the straight 7th of 14 at Mt Barker Mdn on January 18 over 1300m, 5.5 len behind Tidwell carrying 56.5kg at $13. Safely held.

form.formComment: Three-year-old gelding (North Pacific - So You Swing) has trialled on three occasions leading into today's race. Fourth over 950m in a Lark Hill trial on March 23. Top stable and keep onside.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Three-year-old gelding (North Pacific - So You Swing) has trialled on three occasions leading into today's race. Fourth over 950m in a Lark Hill trial on March 23. Top stable and keep onside.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break; only one run when second last of 12 at Belmont Park Mdn on November 19 over 1200m, 6 len behind Flash Dancer with 56kg at $6.50. Blinkers on and is worth a look.

formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-1). Resuming after a break; only one run when second last of 12 at Belmont Park Mdn on November 19 over 1200m, 6 len behind Flash Dancer with 56kg at $6.50. Blinkers on and is worth a look.

form.formComment: Last start 8th of 11 at Belmont Park Mdn on March 25 over 1000m, 7 len behind Joyoh with 56kg at $61. Before that 7th of 10 at Belmont Park 0Mwly on March 4 over 1000m, 5.5 len behind Snow Prince with 54kg at $201. Passing.

formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2). Last start 8th of 11 at Belmont Park Mdn on March 25 over 1000m, 7 len behind Joyoh with 56kg at $61. Before that 7th of 10 at Belmont Park 0Mwly on March 4 over 1000m, 5.5 len behind Snow Prince with 54kg at $201. Passing.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Crowded for room near 100m and steadied.
Raced wide throughout. Steadied when close to heels on straightening.

form.formComment: Last start tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 10 at Pinjarra Scarpside 3yo 0Mwly on March 12 over 1200m, 0.6 len behind Bondi Lifesaver with 57kg at $7.50. The run before that 6th of 10 at Pinjarra Scarpside 3yo Mdn on March 5 over 1400m, 5.5 len behind Kat Five with 55kg at $4.60. Leading prospect.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-0.5). The run before that 6th of 10 at Pinjarra Scarpside 3yo Mdn on March 5 over 1400m, 5.5 len behind Kat Five with 55kg at $4.60. Leading prospect.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly through the early stages.

form.formComment: At debut, 9th of 14 at this track 3yo Mdn on March 22 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Mamma Says So carrying 55kg at $7.

form.formComment: Cammeron Ellery trained three-year-old filly lining up for debut. Looked good in a recent trial win. The betting will be key.

form.formComment: Filly by Proisir facing the starter for the first time. Finished seventh in a Lark Hill trial over 950m on March 9. Well held in recent trials so prefer to see.
